goal: Eliminate manual workflow-observation and result-reconciliation tasks while preserving fail-closed automation.
publication_chain: validate-chain-continuation generates and embeds the run receipt
full-validation-chain-report artifact transfers it to build-pages
build-pages publishes the embedded receipt into static/status
build-pages reconciles the current receipt with the prior public bounded history
verify-public-pages checks the automation, run-bound receipt, and history endpoints

history_policy.prior_history_unavailable_result: initialize a new bounded sequence without assigning a manual task

cancelled_run_policy: A cancelled run is recorded fail-closed and the next repository-owned trigger re-evaluates automatically.
external_evidence_policy: Missing source locators or specialist receipts remain fail-closed under their declared intake owners and do not become user tasks.
non_claims: This status proves an automation, publication, and bounded-history contract, not a successful future workflow run.
Public receipt reachability records bounded workflow observations only.
It does not grant merge, release, deployment, publication, execution, or downstream mutation authority.
It does not convert missing external evidence into an acceptance result.
